characters.description: A void-affinity fighter and head of a Savannah household who can open the time-altered Time Prison. He has brought Gerald and his allies into custody and is increasingly willing to show trusted Crown figures how his unusual ability works.
characters.name: Derek Hunt

characters.description: Derek's telepathic companion and a member of his Savannah household. She is already established as a close ally before this volume begins.
characters.name: Silvi

characters.description: A prince of Cydaria and a formidable lightning fighter. He helps Derek contain the aftermath of the palace attack and is trusted with dangerous Crown responsibilities.
characters.name: Edgar

characters.description: An elite Crown fighter who holds several attackers at bay during the palace assault and helps Derek and Edgar contain the threat.
characters.name: Avery

characters.description: A Crown leader whose voice can compel obedience. She secures Gerald's possessions after his capture and helps prevent the prisoners from contacting outside allies.
characters.name: Alana

characters.description: Savannah's city lord, an appraiser, and a perceptive interrogator. She shows Derek her rune-secured prison and explains her preference for secure, dignified confinement during investigations.
characters.name: Natalie

characters.description: A Torith noble held after an attack on Edward and the palace guards. King Edwin identifies him as a trafficker, while Natalie and Alana begin the difficult work of uncovering his plans and connections.
characters.name: Gerald Torith

characters.description: A dangerous operative captured with Gerald's group and known as the Shadow Witch. She can resist Alana's compelling voice, though not as completely as Derek can.
characters.name: Vanessa Hodges

characters.description: A captive held alongside Gerald Torith whose questioning has produced little useful intelligence.
characters.name: Cliff Arden

characters.description: Derek's returning guard and trainer, with a personal grievance against Torith. Gerald's confinement gives him hope that his son is safer and that the kidnapping and murder connected to his family may finally be explained.
characters.name: Jacks

characters.description: A versatile crafter in Derek's household. Improved meditation greatly increases her output as she works with mana cores and materials supplied through Derek and Roman.
characters.name: Brandi Fields

characters.description: The household manager who handles supplies and shop operations. She provides the practical business oversight that lets the other members focus on crafting, training, and field work.
characters.name: Malorie

characters.description: A contract specialist and business associate already working with Derek's household before this volume. He supports Malorie in Savannah's commercial dealings.
characters.name: Rudy

characters.description: A wind user who trains and gains levels alongside Jacks. Her recent class change has strengthened her confidence in the field.
characters.name: Rayna West

characters.description: A young spear trainee in Derek's household. He is progressing quickly under instruction and preparing to enroll at the Academy.
characters.name: Thomas Stewart

characters.description: A spear fighter who trains Thomas as he prepares to enroll at the Academy.
characters.name: Shae

characters.description: The Savannah Adventurers Guild guildmaster and a spear fighter. She joins Vanessa's party for the dungeon's first trial.
characters.name: Shea Holmes

characters.description: An alchemist developing permanent-stat products from void-beast materials. He supplies Derek and Brandi while continuing experiments that could expand the household's commercial reach.
characters.name: Roman

characters.description: A lower-ranked Crown member and Derek's friend whose family lives under the disgraced Gracefall name. He attends the auction with his son Jensen and niece Claire.
characters.name: Walter Gracefall

characters.description: Walter's son accompanies his father and Claire to the Crown auction. His Academy studies are almost complete, after which he hopes to serve in the royal army.
characters.name: Jensen

characters.description: Walter's niece, who attends the Crown auction with Walter and Jensen.
characters.name: Claire

characters.description: Following King Edwin's restoration of House Searidge, Walter's son bears its recovered surname. Near the end of his Academy studies, he plans military service.
characters.name: Jensen Searidge

characters.description: Walter Gracefall after King Edwin restores his family's Searidge name and dissolves the inherited soul contract that suppressed him. The decision ends decades of punishment imposed on his line.
characters.name: Walter Searidge

characters.description: Cydaria's foremost combat smith, known by his professional title. He offers Derek an interim halberd and agrees to forge a custom glaive after his raid commitment permits it.
characters.name: Walking Forge

characters.description: The combat smith known as the Walking Forge. He gives Derek his own halberd for temporary use and plans to forge a custom glaive after his current obligations permit it.
characters.name: Tyron Blacksteel

characters.description: A Crown business contact and established adventurer.
characters.name: Stella Brighton

characters.description: Cydaria's king. He condemns Gerald's attack and trafficking, then entrusts Natalie and Alana with the prisoners and the investigation.
characters.name: King Edwin

characters.description: Cydaria's crown prince and army commander. He survives the palace attack and reports how Avery, Derek, and Edgar defeated Gerald's force.
characters.name: Edward

characters.description: A light-affinity healer in Edgar's raid. He supports the proposed allocation of lower-level members to the expedition's first trial.
characters.name: Tristan Alistair

characters.description: A mage in Edgar's raid.
characters.name: Felix Ayala

characters.description: A level-250 healer assigned to Vanessa's ten-person trial party. She serves as its principal healer as the group enters a ten-day beast-tide survival challenge.
characters.name: Elena Webb

characters.description: A level-245 support fighter assigned to Vanessa's ten-person party for the dungeon's first trial.
characters.name: Kieran Dawson

characters.description: The armored tank in Vanessa's ten-person party for the dungeon's first trial.
characters.name: Sachiko Sato

characters.description: An archer in Vanessa's first-trial formation. She helps defend the group against increasingly large beast waves over the ten-day challenge.
characters.name: Louise Bonilla

characters.description: A support fighter who applies debuffs in Vanessa's first-trial party. He joins the defensive formation facing a prolonged series of beast waves.
characters.name: John Newman

characters.description: A foreign king who learns that Cydaria's elite raid force is inside a time-dilated dungeon. He prepares a joint invasion and assigns his brother to command the field campaign.
characters.name: King Osian

characters.description: King Osian's brother, a duke appointed to command the planned invasion of Cydaria. Osian trusts him with the battlefield forces while the kingdom's strongest fighters are absent.
characters.name: Riven

characters.description: King Osian's brother and the invading battlefield commander. He offers Alana protection for her people if she remains outside the war.
characters.name: Riven Elris

characters.description: Derek's co-operator on a portable shower product. He becomes a party to the Savannah business agreement formed through The Void Emporium while Derek is away in the raid.
characters.name: Jeffrey Tate

characters.description: A level-250 raid healer who accompanies Derek, Edgar, Avery, and Tyron during a sparring excursion while the first trial remains active.
characters.name: Jasper Ross

characters.description: Jacks's son and an Academy graduate with prior dungeon leadership experience. He leads the temporary group assembled to test Brandi's elemental mana-core weapons.
characters.name: Jake Herrett

characters.description: A dual-blade swordswoman in Vanessa's first-trial party. The ten-day beast tide leaves her with catastrophic leg injuries, but Tristan expects his healing to prevent permanent loss.
characters.name: Sierra Cook

characters.description: A raid support mage selected for the five-person legendary trial. Her buffs strengthen the combatants as three enormous wyverns open their attack.
characters.name: Tara Perez

characters.description: A subdued psychic amphitheer whom Avery contracts and names. Her attempted mental control fails against his practiced resistance, and their new bond immediately begins changing her.
characters.name: Lyra

characters.description: An adult fire wyvern that Edgar incapacitates after a prolonged battle. Facing death, the creature accepts his second contract attempt and receives the name Blitz as their bond begins.
characters.name: Blitz

characters.description: A moss-covered dragonkin worm subdued and contracted by Tyron. Their immediate bond transforms the creature, which Tyron names Rocky.
characters.name: Rocky
